text:
{
"lesson_title": "The Engine of Life: How Your Heart Pumps",
"steps": [
"Deoxygenated blood enters the right atrium",
"The right ventricle pushes blood to the lungs",
"Oxygenated blood returns to the left atrium",
"The left ventricle pumps blood to the body",
"Valves ensure one-way blood flow"
],
"use_svg": true,
"category": "science",
"hook_question": "Ever wondered how your heart keeps beating without you ever telling it to?",
"continuation_topic": "Circulatory System and Blood Vessels"
}
